context:
DRAGONFORCE INTEL🐲🔍
=====================
📌105 Victims since December 2023
📌Most affected Sector: Manufacturing, Construction
📌Most affected Country: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇦🇺 🇨🇦 🇮🇹 🇨🇳
📌Notable Victims: Palau Government, Yakult Australia, Coca-Cola Singapore
📌Used Tools: Cobalt Strike, SystemBC, Mimikatz, ADFind, Powershell
📌Initially used dedicated site for each victims to host their data, but then moved to a centralized domain that hosts all the leaks together
💡DragonForce Ransomware Group changed their File Server and moved their storage to another server in March- April 2025
  dszmdx3jr7vggdaf2c5k4qunt4mxclelhgbtjlgewlkmlnfpsnsg3sad.onion
📌Instead of Count-Down Timer, the group had directly put the Leak Time on their DLS
💡It is notable that DragonForce had infected a major Chinese 🇨🇳 Manufacturer, hence removing a Chinese Nexus/Connection of the group
💡11 Samples of DragonForce Ransomware that are detected was created on 23rd September 2024
💡DragonForce Affiliates had made use of leaked builder of LockBit in their operations, as 4 such samples were uncovered
💡It can be assumed that DragonForce had a bug previously, which was cleared in the next version circulating as "dragon_patched"
📌DragonForce group uses Binary equivalent of "DragonForce" (01000100 01110010 01100001 01100111 01101111 01101110 01000110 01101111 01110010 01100011 01100101) on their Ransom Note
📌Data Encoding: Base64, XOR
📌Data Encryption: Salsa20 or ChaCha
